description: Auto-discover tables / views / MVs in an Apache Doris database; emit one observable Dagster asset per entity.

database.label: Database
database.description: Database to discover (single DB per workspace).

username.label: Username
username.description: Doris user with read access to information_schema + target tables.

ssl.label: SSL
ssl.description: Use SSL for the MySQL connection.

schemas.label: Schemas
schemas.description: Restrict discovery to these schemas. Default = the configured `database`.

include_patterns.label: Include Patterns
include_patterns.description: fnmatch-style globs — keep matching object names.

exclude_patterns.label: Exclude Patterns
exclude_patterns.description: fnmatch-style globs — drop matching object names.

import_materialized_views.label: Import Materialized Views
import_materialized_views.description: Emit assets for materialized views + async MVs.

group_name.label: Group Name
group_name.description: Dagster group name for all discovered assets.

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Owners applied to every discovered asset.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Tags applied to every discovered asset.
